policy: Normal gameplay work records editor hooks here. The editor UI itself is updated in batches when the user explicitly asks to update the editor.

items.title: 기초 에디터 준비실
items.summary: manifest, backlog, asset slots, and local save key summaries can be reviewed from a separate editor page.

items.title: 세계선 저장 데이터 수동 편집
items.summary: Allow editing active save, save slots, gold, level, region, equipment, inventory, and profile with validation and rollback.

items.title: 노드맵 수동 구성 에디터
items.summary: Edit node positions, connections, node type budgets, hidden nodes, merchant/rest/treasure nodes, and background image slots.

items.title: 이미지/사운드 슬롯 관리자
items.summary: Manage expected file names, folders, missing assets, and crop presets for images and audio.

items.title: 아이템/몬스터 DB 관리
items.summary: Edit equipment, item icons, monster stats, monster sprites, rewards, drop tables, and future legendary options.

items.title: 첫 각성/성향 질문 편집
items.summary: Edit first-start profile defaults, dice stat rules, alignment questions, and result text.

items.title: 사운드/볼륨 기본값 설정
items.summary: Configure default BGM/SFX volume and per-scene audio file slots.

items.title: 안드로이드 PWA 업데이트 셸 기준
items.summary: Track hosted PWA update manifest, GitHub Pages deployment, Android shell update boundaries, and release checklist for future APK or Trusted Web Activity packaging.

items.title: 에디터 변경점 검증/내보내기
items.summary: Validate changed JSON, create backup snapshots, and export editor changes into game runtime data files.
